Package com.stardevllc.starlib.observable

Interface Property<T>

All Superinterfaces:
Observable, ObservableValue<T>
All Known Subinterfaces:
ReadOnlyProperty<T>, ReadWriteProperty<T>
All Known Implementing Classes:
ClockBooleanProperty, ClockLongProperty, ListProperty, MapProperty, ReadOnlyBooleanProperty, ReadOnlyDoubleProperty, ReadOnlyFloatProperty, ReadOnlyIntegerProperty, ReadOnlyListProperty, ReadOnlyLongProperty, ReadOnlyMapProperty, ReadOnlyNumberProperty, ReadOnlyObjectProperty, ReadOnlySetProperty, ReadOnlyStringProperty, ReadOnlyUUIDProperty, ReadWriteBooleanProperty, ReadWriteDoubleProperty, ReadWriteFloatProperty, ReadWriteIntegerProperty, ReadWriteLongProperty, ReadWriteObjectProperty, ReadWriteStringProperty, ReadWriteUUIDProperty, SetProperty, StringFormatter
public interface Property<T> extends ObservableValue<T>
